sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Grid 2-col desktop. Left: Value proposition & CTAs. Right: Animated waveform graphic (built with Framer motion bars).
sections.requirements: Waveform must be visually engaging, moving automatically. No audio. CTA points to Calendly mock.

sections.name: Problem_Solution
sections.layout: Side-by-side or stacked bento cards with scroll animation. Emphasize contrast (Problem: dull, Solution: vibrant mint/blue accents).

sections.name: HowItWorks
sections.layout: 3-step visual flow. Numbered badges with soft mint green backgrounds (#E6F8F5).

sections.name: Features
sections.layout: 2x3 Grid. Icons from lucide-react. Cards with solid white background and 1px subtle border.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.layout: Cards featuring dentist portraits, quote, and prominent metrics (e.g., '40 hrs saved/week').

sections.name: Pricing
sections.layout: 3-tier cards, annual/monthly toggle. Center tier highlighted in Deep Navy (#0A1128) with white text.

sections.name: Integrations
sections.layout: Marquee with grayscale clinic software/company logos.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.layout: Accordion list in a constrained max-w-3xl container.

sections.name: CTA
sections.layout: Deep navy banner (#0A1128), ivory text, dental blue button (#00AEEF) for final demo push.

components_strategy.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or smooth rounded (rounded-xl) for a friendly yet professional medical vibe.
components_strategy.cards: White background, very subtle shadow (shadow-sm), 1px border. Deep Navy used only for highlighting.

animation_rules.waveform: Use framer-motion to animate multiple vertical bars in a row. Heights should ping-pong smoothly to simulate voice activity. Use dental blue (#00AEEF) and mint green (#E6F8F5).
animation_rules.scroll: Staggered fade-up for section content. Not too aggressive, keep it clinical and precise.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the google_fonts_url into the index.html or global css.
Update tailwind.config.js to include font families: 'DM Serif Display' for serif and 'DM Sans' for sans.
Update tailwind.config.js to extend colors matching the 'colors' block in this JSON.

Build the application using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Ensure components are pure React/Tailwind/Framer, avoiding full shadcn imports if they override custom layouts, but use shadcn for Accordion/Tabs.
Do NOT use purple or generic SaaS gradients. Stick strictly to the defined colors: Navy (#0A1128), Ivory (#FDFBF7), Dental Blue (#00AEEF), Soft Mint (#E6F8F5).
Implement the waveform animation visually using HTML/CSS/Framer Motion, simulating a voice AI agent. Ensure it fits a modern clinical tech vibe.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
For the integrations strip, use react-fast-marquee and grayscale the logos.
